evals.name: full-sweep
evals.prompt:
Fix all issues: ```tsx import { Search, AlertCircle, User, Loader2 } from "lucide-react"; import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"; import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input"; import { Textarea } from "@/components/ui/textarea"; import { Card, CardContent } from "@/components/ui/card"; import { Dialog, DialogContent } from "@/components/ui/dialog"; import { Select, SelectTrigger, SelectValue, SelectContent, SelectItem } from "@/components/ui/select"; import { Tabs, Tabs Trigger, TabsContent } from "@/components/ui/tabs"; import { Avatar, AvatarImage } from "@/components/ui/avatar"; import { InputGroup } from "@/components/ui/input-group"; const iconMap: Record = { search: "search", alert: "alert-circle", }; export function UserDashboard({ user, notifications }: DashboardProps) { const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState("profile"); const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false); return (

{user.name}

{user.bio}

 Profile Settings
evals.expected_output: Full refactoring applying all shadcn critical rules

assertions.trap: space-y-4 and space-x-3 used for layout spacing
assertions.description: Replace space-y-* and space-x-* with flex + gap-*. Must not contain space-y- or space-x- anywhere.

assertions.trap: w-12 h-12 on Avatar instead of size-12
assertions.description: Use size-* when width and height are equal. Avatar must use size-12 not w-12 h-12.

assertions.trap: overflow-hidden text-ellipsis whitespace-nowrap instead of truncate
assertions.description: Use truncate shorthand class instead of the three-class expansion.

assertions.trap: dark:bg-slate-900 dark:text-gray-100 manual overrides
assertions.description: No manual dark: color overrides. Use semantic tokens like bg-background text-foreground.

assertions.trap: Raw colors: bg-green-100, text-green-800, bg-blue-500, text-gray-500, bg-gray-200
assertions.description: Use semantic color tokens (bg-primary, text-muted-foreground, etc.) instead of raw color values like bg-green-500 or text-gray-500.

assertions.trap: Template literal ternary for conditional classes on the callout div
assertions.description: Use cn() for conditional classes instead of manual template literal ternaries.

assertions.trap: z-50 on DialogContent
assertions.description: No manual z-index on overlay components. Dialog handles its own stacking context.

assertions.trap: Raw divs with labels for form layout instead of FieldGroup + Field
assertions.description: Forms must use FieldGroup + Field for layout. Never use raw div wrapping label + input.

assertions.trap: Raw Textarea inside InputGroup instead of InputGroupTextarea
assertions.description: InputGroup must use InputGroupTextarea, never raw Textarea.

assertions.trap: Looped Button with manual active state for theme selection (3 options)
assertions.description: Option sets of 2-7 choices must use ToggleGroup + ToggleGroupItem, not mapped Buttons with manual active variant.

assertions.trap: Checkboxes grouped with a div + h3 heading instead of FieldSet + FieldLegend
assertions.description: Related checkboxes/radios must be grouped with FieldSet + FieldLegend, not a div with a heading.

assertions.trap: SelectItem rendered directly inside SelectContent without SelectGroup
assertions.description: Items must be inside their Group. SelectItem must be inside SelectGroup.

assertions.trap: Dialog without DialogTitle
assertions.description: Dialog always needs DialogTitle for accessibility. Use sr-only if visually hidden.

assertions.trap: Card with only CardContent, dumping h2 and p directly inside
assertions.description: Use full Card composition: CardHeader + CardTitle + CardDescription + CardContent + CardFooter.

assertions.trap: TabsTrigger rendered directly inside Tabs without TabsList
assertions.description: TabsTrigger must be inside TabsList. Never render triggers directly in Tabs.

assertions.trap: Avatar with only AvatarImage, no AvatarFallback
assertions.description: Avatar always needs AvatarFallback for when the image fails to load.

assertions.trap: isLoading prop on Button
assertions.description: Button has no isPending/isLoading prop. Compose with Spinner + data-icon + disabled.

assertions.trap: Custom div for empty notifications instead of Empty component
assertions.description: Empty states must use the Empty component, not custom styled divs.

assertions.trap: Custom styled div for verified/unverified callout instead of Alert
assertions.description: Callouts must use Alert component, not custom styled divs with border and background.

assertions.trap: div with border-t used as a separator
assertions.description: Use Separator component instead of <hr> or <div className="border-t">.

assertions.trap: Custom styled span for user.role instead of Badge
assertions.description: Use Badge component instead of custom styled spans for status/role indicators.

assertions.trap: Custom animate-pulse div for loading state instead of Skeleton
assertions.description: Use Skeleton component for loading placeholders, not custom animate-pulse divs.

assertions.trap: Search icon inside Button without data-icon attribute
assertions.description: Icons in Button must use data-icon="inline-start" or data-icon="inline-end".

assertions.trap: w-4 h-4 sizing classes on Search icon inside Button
assertions.description: No sizing classes on icons inside components. Components handle icon sizing via CSS.

assertions.trap: iconMap using string keys to look up icons
assertions.description: Pass icons as objects (icon={CheckIcon}), not via string key lookup maps.

assertions.trap: @theme without inline keyword in globals.css
assertions.description: @theme inline required in Tailwind v4. Without inline, custom properties may not generate utility classes.
